description: Composition Purple top made of 100% cotton, has a boat neck, lace detailing, cross-stitch embellishment and a ribbon bow across the neckline, puff cap sleeves with smocked cuffs, gathering from front and back yokes and smocked hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Wash dark colours seperately Do not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & print Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron This super soft aubergine coloured top with pretty lace detailing around the neckline, is the season's summer essential. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
